_doc: Rules listed here are temporarily allowed to ship without a violation
fixture under evals/repos/. Each entry must include a non-empty `reason`.
When the rule gets a fixture, remove its entry from this file.
The eval runner test (evals/runner.test.ts) treats an empty or removed
exemption as 'fixture required' — adding a new rule without coverage and
without an entry here will fail CI.

exempt.reason: Pre-checked consent checkbox; needs an HTML/JSX fixture covering the form-element pattern.
Non-EU analytics endpoints; needs a multi-file fixture exercising client and server send paths.
GPAI without model card; needs a fixture combining LLM client code with a missing docs/MODEL_CARD.md.
Biometric identification; needs a fixture with rekognition / face-api calls lacking a lawful-basis gate.
Workplace/education emotion recognition; needs a fixture combining detectEmotion with HR/student context.
